query:
SELECT cg.id, cg.name, cg.minQuantity, cg.maxQuantity, cg.isRequired, p.name as productName, c.name as categoryName
FROM complement_groups cg
JOIN products p ON cg.productId = p.id
JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id
WHERE p.establishmentId = 210001
ORDER BY c.sortOrder, p.sortOrder, cg.sortOrder;
